label: Margin & Health
description: CeFi margin bars, SPAN summary, DeFi health factor, and distance-to-liquidation across all venues.

0.7.note: isEmpty guard when marginLimits, ltvLimits, and hfTimeSeries are all empty; CollapsibleSections are individually guarded by length>0.

0.8.note: hasError guard returning 'Failed to load margin data'.

0.9.note: No dead code — SPAN Margin section uses static mock values (known; data wiring is an L1/L3 concern, not dead code).

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[risk]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports. 0.6 Added Skeleton loading guard (4 skeleton rows). 0.7 Added isEmpty guard when marginLimits, ltvLimits, and hfTimeSeries are all empty; CollapsibleSections are individually guarded by length>0. 0.8 Added hasError guard returning 'Failed to load margin data'. 0.9 No dead code — SPAN Margin section uses static mock values (known; data wiring is an L1/L3 concern, not dead code).

1.1.note: Data via useRiskData() hook; sortedLimits/hfTimeSeries/distanceToLiquidation all from context.

1.2.note: use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() for scope. 1.3-1.5 sortedLimits is scope-filtered (riskLimits filtered by strategy entity in context).

1.3.note: 1.5 sortedLimits is scope-filtered (riskLimits filtered by strategy entity in context).

1.5.note: sortedLimits is scope-filtered (riskLimits filtered by strategy entity in context).

1.7.note: No mock constants in widget file. FINDING: SPAN Margin section (lines 77-75) uses hardcoded values ($180k, $135k, 79%) — not wired to context. This is acceptable as stub UI pending IBKR SPAN API; should be tracked as L3/L5 item.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useRiskData() hook; sortedLimits/hfTimeSeries/distanceToLiquidation all from context. 1.2 use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() for scope. 1.3-1.5 sortedLimits is scope-filtered (riskLimits filtered by strategy entity in context). 1.6 Empty scope returns unfiltered data. 1.7 No mock constants in widget file. FINDING: SPAN Margin section (lines 77-75) uses hardcoded values ($180k, $135k, 79%) — not wired to context. This is acceptable as stub UI pending IBKR SPAN API; should be tracked as L3/L5 item.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (real-time HF/margin), paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only display widget.

3.2.note: isBatchMode in context; not used by this widget (no action buttons).

3.5.note: Paper mode: margin/HF from paper account positions.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: No interactive buttons. CollapsibleSection handled by shared component.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.7 (CollapsibleSection toggles for CeFi/DeFi/HF/Distance sections), 4.8 (WidgetScroll works).

5.1.note: Target strategies: defi-lending-borrowing (HF/LTV), cefi-spot-arbitrage (margin), defi-amm-lp (margin). Both CeFi margin bars and DeFi HF sections render.

7.1.note: #3b82f6 replaced with var(--chart-3). #f97316 replaced with var(--risk-emergency) after token landed in globals.css.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

l7.notes: 7.1 fixed; both hardcoded hexes now use CSS variable tokens (chart-3, risk-emergency).

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[11px]/text-[9px] replaced with text-micro/text-caption/text-nano tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Progress, Table, Skeleton, LimitBar, CollapsibleSection from ui/shared.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare div onClick, no unlabelled inputs. Display-only widget.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=3 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 needs human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Unique CeFi+DeFi margin health widget combining SPAN, LTV/HF, and distance-to-liquidation.

relationships.notes: SPAN values ($180K/$135K) are currently static stubs. distanceToLiquidation from context.

dataContract.notes: marginLimits and ltvLimits filtered from sortedLimits in context. SPAN values currently hardcoded stubs.

gaps: SPAN margin values ($180K/$135K) are hardcoded stubs — should come from IBKR gateway
coverage.notes: CeFi margin bars and DeFi HF/LTV both rendered when respective limit categories present.

knownIssues: SPAN Margin section has hardcoded values ($180k initial, $135k maintenance, 79% utilization) — pending IBKR SPAN API wiring; track for L3/L5

findings.description: Widget was missing isLoading/hasError entirely — added Skeleton loading guard and error state
Added explicit isEmpty guard for when all margin data arrays are empty
risk-margin-widget.tsx:165-166 — stroke='#3b82f6' and fill='#3b82f6' on AreaChart for HF time series
risk-margin-widget.tsx:152 — stroke='#f97316' for emergency threshold ReferenceLine
findings.fix: Replaced with var(--risk-emergency) after token landed in globals.css (#f97316 light / #fb923c dark)

findings.description: risk-margin-widget.tsx — ~25 user-visible strings (section titles, margin labels, threshold labels)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-margin-widget.tsx — text-[10px], text-[11px], text-[9px] used for dense labels and chart annotations
